name: Choosing the Lens: Strategic Perspective Activation in Context-Dependent Argumentation

description: arXiv:2605.31581v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The same arguments often need to be evaluated under different external regimes. An agent with influence over the regime has a strategic lever that standard formalisms do not directly capture. We introduce context-dependent argumentation frameworks (CDAFs), an extension of Dung's theory in which a defeat function determines, per context, which...
author: Albert Sadowski, Jaros{\l}aw A. Chudziak
